summary: Completed testing of HMM regime model feature. Backend API correctly returns HMM with 3x3 transition matrix and GMM without transition matrix. Frontend Regime Model toggle works, Model tab displays HMM badge and transition matrix for HMM runs, and no transition matrix for GMM runs. Both models produce different results (HMM Sharpe: 0.85, GMM Sharpe: -0.69). Caching works correctly (second call <1s). All regression features (drawdown_method, diagnostics, tabs) still functional.

flaky_endpoints.issue: One GMM backtest returned 502 error (but passed in subsequent test)

passed_tests: Backend: HMM backtest returns regime_model='hmm', 3x3 transition matrix with rows summing to 1.0, trades, diagnostics
Backend: GMM backtest returns regime_model='gmm', null transition_matrix, trades
Backend: HMM and GMM produce different results (HMM Sharpe: 0.85 vs GMM Sharpe: -0.69, different trade counts: 1229 vs 1901)
Backend: Drawdown method 'anchored' still works correctly
Backend: Diagnostics (PSR, CI, bootstrap) still present in single backtest
Backend: Instruments endpoint returns all 6 instruments with correct specs
Backend: Strategy info endpoint returns required fields
Frontend: Regime Model toggle renders with HMM and GMM buttons (data-testid: run-panel-regime-hmm, run-panel-regime-gmm)
Frontend: HMM button clickable, runs backtest successfully
Frontend: Model tab shows HMM badge and 3x3 transition matrix table after HMM run
Frontend: GMM button clickable, runs backtest successfully
Frontend: Model tab shows GMM badge and no transition matrix after GMM run (correct)
Frontend: All tabs render correctly (Overview, Charts, Trades, Model)

success_percentage.integration: 100% (HMM/GMM regime model selection and display working end-to-end)
